title: Firing The Diamond
description: This is a modpack designed for playing on the minecraft server Diamondfire
body:
This modpack is a collection of mods designed to improve perforance when playing, building and coding

A QOL modpack made for the server [Diamondfire](https://mcdiamondfire.com/about/)
ps updates are 100% random

I do not own ANY mods within this modpack if you are the creator of one or more of the mods you may ask for it to be removed from this modpack

List of mods:
(may not be in all versons)
- [+1 Clicker Essentials](https://modrinth.com/mod/+1-clicker-essentials)
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin)
- [Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches)
- [CodeClient](https://modrinth.com/mod/codeclient)
- [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric)
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/mod/fullbright)
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks)
- [Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium)
- [ScalableLux](https://modrinth.com/mod/scalablelux)
- [Server Pinger Fixer](https://modrinth.com/mod/serverpingerfixer)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [spark](https://modrinth.com/mod/spark)
- [WI Zoom](https://modrinth.com/mod/wi-zoom)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/mpalladium)
- [Better Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-block-entities)
- [Disable Insecure Chat Toast](https://modrinth.com/mod/disableinsecurechattoast)
- [NoNarrator](https://modrinth.com/mod/nonarrator)
- [Network Protocol Disconnect](https://modrinth.com/mod/network-protocol-disconnect)
